events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: leaving Schrader cores in during evacuation throttles the service port so the vacuum pump can't pull the system down to true deep vacuum, even if a compound gauge appears fine — moisture/air/non-condensables likely remain in this operating system, risking acid formation and compressor damage. Marked as `fail`/`high` risk, with corrective actions to recover charge, remove cores, re-evacuate to spec using a micron gauge with a decay hold test, then reinstall cores and recharge.
